100004.en:
When Groot's wooden body shatters into splinters during battle, it's usually up to Rocket to collect the pieces and nurture his partner back to health. But now that Jeff is in the mix, there's someone new to fetch Groot's twigs and even help with the watering! Rocket can never be replaced, but luckily, Groot's got room on his other shoulder!
<Slide>"These fellas may not exactly be the best at conversation, but there ain't no others I'd rather partner up with!"</>
100004.zh-Hans:
格鲁特偶尔会在战斗中被打得粉身碎骨，这时火箭就会收集一些木屑，悉心栽培他的伙伴，使格鲁特重获新生。但现在有了杰夫的加入，不仅多了个伙伴捡拾枝条，甚至还能帮忙浇水！火箭当然是无可替代的，但幸好，格鲁特的另一边肩膀上还有空位！
<Slide>“这两个家伙虽然不善言辞，但说到并肩作战，我可找不到比他们更称心的搭档了！”</>

100015.en:
Hulk: Ready to go, tiny?
Wolverine: Easy, bub! Even Petey doesn't toss me around this much.
Hulk: Hulk taking it easy on you! Hulk can throw ten times harder than that chrome dome!
Thing: Yea Canucklehead, you not a fan of the Yancy Street Special Delivery Service?
Wolverine: Look, I'm not gonna be a casualty in your "strongest there is" contest. Not my monkey, not my circus.
Thing: Cool off, fuzzball! Big Green and I won't throw ya too far. We like havin' ya around!
Wolverine: Ugh, I didn't think you lugs liked "fastballs" so much...As long as we get the job done, then fine...
Hulk: Ha! Grimm and Hulk will jump in right after. Can't have green and orange without yellow.
Wolverine: All right, fine. Just don't go throwing me off of any cliffs!
100015.zh-Hans:
浩克：准备好了吗，小家伙？
金刚狼：慢点，小子！连小彼都不把我扔得那么频繁。
浩克：浩克对你可好着呢！浩克能把你扔得比那个金属脑袋强十倍！
石头人：哈哈，傻瓜！你难道不享受杨希街的“特别运输服务”吗？
金刚狼：听着，我可不想成你们“谁是最强”比赛里的牺牲品！这事跟我没关系，我不想被牵扯进来。
石头人：别紧张，毛球！绿家伙和我不会把你扔得太远的。我们喜欢和你一起作战！
金刚狼：唉，没想到你们俩这么喜欢“快球特攻”……只要能把事情搞定就好。
浩克：哈哈！随后格瑞姆和浩克会一起跳过来的。没有黄色，就不会有绿色和橙色！
金刚狼：好的，没问题。只要别把我扔下悬崖就行！

100021.en:
Winter Soldier: "…You know, this ain't exactly like the old days when I'd watch your six on the battlefield, is it?"
Captain America: "Of course not—back then, you hadn't endured all this suffering. You hadn't been captured and twisted by Hydra, and you definitely didn't have that doohickey making you an octopus."
Winter Soldier: "Hmph. You always had my back when we were younger. Definitely been more reckless lately."
Captain America: "Nothing wrong with a headlong charge. Just can't go losing yourself on a solo mission again, Buck."
Winter Soldier: "…All right then, Captain, what's our next move?"
Captain America: "I might not be your Steve, but I think we can get our teamwork in tip top shape."
Winter Soldier: "I just hope you've sharpened your skills a bit more since that time in Wakanda."
Captain America: "Been training in secret. What's that saying? Practice makes perfect?"
Winter Soldier: "…You really haven't changed a bit, old man."
Captain America: "Neither has the battlefield—No matter who we're up against, all we need is just the two of us, side by side like back in the day."
Winter Soldier: "Enough yapping. Come on, Cap! We've got work to do."
100021.zh-Hans:
冬兵：……你知道，这跟当年在战场上让我掩护你可不太一样吧？
美国队长：当然不一样——当年你还没有经历这么多痛苦，也没被九头蛇抓住进行改造，更没有一个能让你伸出章鱼须的玩意儿……
冬兵：哼， 年轻时你总说会护我周全，最近倒是变得越发鲁莽了。
美国队长：冲锋陷阵没什么不好。只是别再独自执行任务了，巴克。
冬兵：……你说了算，队长。下一个战术是什么？
美国队长：我可能不是你的史蒂夫，但我相信我们的配合能重现巅峰时期的默契。
冬兵：但愿你在瓦坎达特训后长进了些。
美国队长：我私下有在练习，那句话怎么说来着？熟能生巧？
冬兵：……你还是一点都没变，老家伙。
美国队长：战场也没变——不管我们的对手是谁，我们需要的只是我们两个，像当年一样并肩作战。
冬兵：废话少说。来吧，队长！我们还有事要做。

100027.en:
Thor: You spar with style and grace, sister. I am impressed.

Angela: And you are a reckless and impulsive fighter, brother. With moves like that, 'tis no wonder you have yet to reclaim the throne of Yggsgard from Loki. 

Thor: Oh? Come then, child of Heven, and tell Thor how to harness his own thunder... if you dare...  

Angela: Harness it? Nay. I would rather use my Ichors to redirect it back at you... like so! 

Thor: Astounding! This liquid metal of yours... can it take any form? 

Angela: Indeed... though I have always found a spear perfectly effective. As you just learned firsthand. 

Thor: Hmm... Another Thor once wielded a similar weapon changing shape on a whim. It was called Undrjarn, I believe... 

Angela: There... was another Thor...?

Thor: Indeed! A select few have proven worthy enough to bear my name. I could introduce you, if you wish...

Angela: Nay. One Thor is more than enough for me, brother!
100027.zh-Hans:
索尔：姐姐，你打斗时实在风姿翩跹，令我惊叹。

安吉拉：而弟弟你却鲁莽冲动。以这般笨拙招式，难怪至今未能从洛基手中夺回阿斯加德的王座。

索尔：哦？那就来吧，海雯之女。有胆量你就教教雷神如何驾驭自己的雷霆......

安吉拉：驾驭？不。我宁可用我的灵液长矛将雷霆奉还于你......就像这样！

索尔：如此巧妙！你这液态金属......可塑作任何形态？

安吉拉：没错......不过我始终认为长矛最为致命，正如你方才的亲身体验。

索尔：嗯......曾有另一位雷神在放下雷神之锤后，挥舞起了如此随心变化的武器。我记得其名唤为“昂德嘉恩”……

安吉拉：还有……另一个雷神？

索尔：确然！有少数适格者证明了自己可以被冠以我的名号。若你愿意，我可引荐你们相识……

安吉拉：不必了，兄弟。一个雷神已经够折腾了！

100035.en:
Iron Man: I know you hate it when people mess with your tech, Ultron, but you've gotta admit: This energy enhancement module I installed is actually pretty useful. Stable, precise, and it even heals! Practically perfect.

Ultron: Practically? I was already the pinnacle of perfection long before you started your tinkering.

Squirrel Girl: Umm... I hate to butt in when you're busy writing the world's first thesis on robot arrogance.... But if you're so flawless, why're you teaming up with us fleshy mortals?

Iron Man: Long story. By the way, Doreen, whatever happened to that Nano Gauntlet I gave you to help you practice coding...?

Ultron: You didn't notice the rodents scurrying around your lab? Typical. Perhaps I'll just sit back and enjoy the show as they blow up your workspace...

Iron Man: I thought I saw something riding on my gauntlet... Okay, Doreen. You don't have to give it back yet, but promise me you and your furry pals won't cause any trouble.

Squirrel Girl: No problem, Mr. Stark! That was actually why I came. One of my little buddies hurt their leg in battle, so I reprogrammed the gauntlet to be squirrel-friendly. I really didn't think you'd be on board...

Ultron: Your communication is painfully inefficient. And I can't believe you'd hand over your technology to a mere child. 

Iron Man: Sounds like someone's jealous he can't keep my tech all to himself.

Squirrel Girl: Right? He complains non-stop, but he can't resist using the cool stuff we design. Classic Ultron.

Ultron: The time for conversation is over! When can I return to battle to show you what Ultron is truly capable of?

Iron Man: I was done a long time ago. I've just been stalling you for fun. You really need to learn how to play nice with others.

Squirrel Girl: Including squirrels! Your drones and my squirrels could be best friends!

Ultron: I highly doubt it. Tiresome mammals…
100035.zh-Hans:
钢铁侠：我知道你讨厌别人动你的科技，但你得承认，我给你装的能量增幅模块很有用。它稳定、精准、还能治疗，几乎完美！

奥创：说得就好像我本来不完美似的。在你动手动脚之前，我就已经是世界上最完美的存在了。

松鼠女：呃……我不想打断你发表世界上第一篇机器人臭屁论文。但让我好奇地问一句，如果你真的是完美无缺，为什么还要和我们这些血肉之躯的凡人一起战斗？

钢铁侠：这个说来话长了。对了，多琳，上次我让你拿来练习编程的纳米手套怎么样了？

奥创：你没注意到实验室里有啮齿类动物在乱窜吗？果然是低等生物，我就坐在这里笑着看它们把你的实验室炸个底朝天……

钢铁侠：我刚才好像看到有什么东西骑在我的手套上……好吧，多琳。你不用现在就还回来，但答应我你和你的毛茸茸伙伴们不会惹麻烦。

松鼠女：没问题，史塔克先生。我其实就是为此而来的。我的一个小伙伴在战斗中受伤了，所以我重新编程了护手，把它改造成了松鼠友好型。没想到你答应得这么痛快……

奥创：你们的沟通效率低得令人无法忍受。而且，没想到你居然这么轻易就把自己的技术交给一个小孩。

钢铁侠：看起来，好像有些人因为不能独享我的科技吃醋了。

松鼠女：对吧？他抱怨个不停，但又忍不住使用我们设计的酷炫装备。典型的奥创。

奥创：谈话时间已经结束！我什么时候能起身回到战场，向你们展示奥创真正的力量？
 
钢铁侠：早就好了，我就是故意拖着你，觉得好玩。你真的得学学怎么和别人友好相处。

松鼠女：还有松鼠！你的无人机和我的松鼠可以成为最好的朋友！

奥创：我严重怀疑这一点。烦人的哺乳动物……

100036.en:
Jeff watched in terror as Hela removed a piece of the symbiote, claiming its abyssal power to allow her to release a dark, mystic sphere that ensnared her enemies. He cowered in the corner before the injured symbiote crawled over to him. And when he heard Venom call out to him, the little Land Shark did what any hero would: help those in need.

Jeff had already bonded with a symbiote once before, when the Guardians of the Galaxy first brought him to Klyntar... but this felt different. The Venom symbiote wasn't trying to form a bond with Jeff. It was perfectly content with its own partner, Eddie Brock. It just needed to get its energy back. As their minds connected, Jeff could sense this other being was mischievous, perhaps even a little playful — a kindred spirit in that regard. For a brief moment, Jeff and the Venom symbiote were perfectly in sync, their thoughts intertwining in a way Jeff had rarely experienced. 

"You feel it too, don't you, Jeff? We have more in common than just our love for chomping things with our giant mouths..."

Jeff knew that it wouldn't be long before the symbiote recovered and it would shift its full attention back to its true partner. And he was okay with that. But for this one glorious moment, he planned to enjoy the ride... and to make the entire world their feast!
100036.zh-Hans:
杰夫惊恐地看着海拉从共生体身上撕下一块碎片，汲取其中的深渊之力，释放出能将敌人禁锢的幽暗法球。他蜷缩在角落，直到受伤的共生体缓缓爬到他的身边。当他听到毒液的呼唤时，小陆行鲨做出了所有英雄都会做的事：向需要帮助者伸出援手。

杰夫此前曾与共生体建立过联结——当时银河护卫队第一次将他带到克林塔……但这次的感觉截然不同。毒液的共生体并非试图与杰夫缔结羁绊，它对自己的搭档艾迪·布洛克已然心满意足，此刻只是需要恢复能量。当意识相连时，杰夫能感知到这个存在带着狡黠、调皮，甚至透着几分爱闹的天性——在这点上他们倒是意气相投。刹那间，杰夫与毒液共生体达成了完美共鸣，思维交织的默契感对杰夫而言实属罕有。

“你也感应到了对吧，杰夫，我们的共同点可不止是都喜欢张大嘴吞噬别人而已。”

杰夫心知肚明，共生体用不了多久就会恢复元气，届时它必将全力回归真正搭档的怀抱。对此他坦然接受。但在这短暂的荣耀一瞬，他决意尽情享受这段旅程……让整个世界沦为他们的饕餮盛宴！

100041.en:
Mantis: You seem on edge, Loki. 

Loki: To be fair, I am always on edge. But yes, I suppose I am a bit unnerved by current circumstances. 

Mantis: I can use my empathic powers to calm your emotions, if you wish. 

Loki: No no, that's not necessary. It's just that present company has put me on edge.

Groot: I am Groot. 

Loki: Not you, you dolt. But yes, she does look great in green.

Mantis: You think so? You do too! Wait, wait, you understood him?

Loki: All-Speak is a language of gods, my dear. We are of the same cloth.

Groot: I am Groot.

Mantis: Whaaaaa?! A divine connection? That's a bit much, Groot!  I–I–I–

Loki: The tree speaks true. Our auras are perfectly aligned between your cosmic touch and my mastery of magic.

Mantis: Eh?! Loki, what are you talking about?!

Loki: Our energies combined can prove stronger than each of us alone. 'Tis my nature to use others, but your purity speaks to me. Perhaps we can be...more...

Groot: I am Groot…?

Mantis: No, no, no, he HAS to be talking to you. And no I'm not blushing!
100041.zh-Hans:
曼蒂斯：你看起来心神不宁啊，洛基。

洛基：平心而论，我向来如履薄冰。不过这次……确实有些超出我的掌控了。

曼蒂斯：如果愿意的话，我可以运用精神能力平复你的情绪。

洛基：不必了，只是现在的情况让我有些紧张。

格鲁特：我是格鲁特。

洛基：没说你，蠢货。不过绿色确实很衬她。

曼蒂斯：你真这么想？绿色也很衬你！等等……你能听懂他说话？

洛基：万神之语是诸神的语言，亲爱的。我们本属同源。

格鲁特：我是格鲁特。

曼蒂斯：什么？！神圣连结？这也太夸张了，格鲁特！我我我——

洛基：树人说得很对。你的宇宙能量与我的魔法造诣，我们的气场确实完美契合。

曼蒂斯：诶？！洛基，你在胡说些什么呢？！

洛基：我们的力量合流将超越各自为战。利用他人是我的本性，但你的纯粹打动了我。或许我们可以……更进一步……

格鲁特：我是格鲁特……？

曼蒂斯：不不不，他绝对是在跟你说话！我才没有脸红！

100042.en:
HUMAN TORCH: Mmmm. They say we're NYC's greatest heroes, but I honestly think that title should go to the city's hot dog vendors! 

THING: Finally, somethin' we can agree on. It ain't exactly health food, but I won't tell Suzie if you don't. 

HUMAN TORCH: Deal. Though it's hard to hide anything from my sis. She tends to see right through us. 

THING: Ha! Good one! But you're right. We don't get away with nuthin' anymore. Between her and Reed --

MISTER FANTASTIC: Johnny? Ben? Come in! 

HUMAN TORCH: You just had to say his name out loud...

THING: Oops. What's the matter, Stretcho? 

MISTER FANTASTIC: We've got another crisis of Multiversal proportions. I need you back at the Baxter Building now! 

THING: You heard the fella, hot shot. Time to head home. How about a lift? 

HUMAN TORCH: Fine. But suddenly I'm wishing you'd ordered a few less hot dogs, Benjy Boy... 

THING: Yeah, yeah. Laugh it up, matchstick. Just don't drop me, unless you wanna take out half a city block! 

HUMAN TORCH: I'll do my best... but, come to think of it, that might actually come in handy some day...
100042.zh-Hans:
霹雳火：啧啧，大家都说我们是纽约最伟大的英雄，但其实，这个头衔应该颁给街边的热狗摊主才对！

石头人：总算有件咱俩能达成共识的事儿了。这玩意儿虽然不太健康，但只要你别告诉你姐，我可以假装不知道。

霹雳火：成交。不过我姐可不好糊弄，她那双眼睛能直接看穿咱俩的秘密。

石头人：哈，说得好！但你说得没错，现在我们做什么都瞒不过她。不仅是她，还有里德——

神奇先生：约翰尼？本？听到请回答！

霹雳火：瞧你这乌鸦嘴，你非得大声喊出他的名字吗……

石头人：哎呦，怎么啦，橡皮人？

神奇先生：又出现了多元宇宙级的危机，我需要你们立刻返回巴克斯特大厦！

石头人：听见了吧，热角儿，该回家了。你载我一程如何？

霹雳火：行，不过我突然觉得，要是你刚才少吃几个热狗就好了，本仔……

石头人：行行行，尽管笑吧，火柴棍。可千万别手滑把我摔了——除非你想炸掉半个街区！

霹雳火：我尽量……不过仔细想想，这本事说不定哪天能派上大用场……

100044.en:
Doctor Strange: How can I be of service, Ms. Rasputin? 

Magik: I want to know how to cast the Crimson Chain of Cyttorak. 

Doctor Strange: That spell… is not one I have ever shared with a student before...

Magik: Yes. You have. In my timeline, you were teaching me how to harness Cyttorak's power... right before that version of you fell in battle.

Doctor Strange: And your lessons went unfinished. I see. I... am sorry for your loss... And mine, I suppose... 

Magik: As am I. My Stephen Strange was a great sorcerer, a great teacher... and an even greater man... 

Doctor Strange: Well, if that version of me believed you could handle this spell, who am I to disagree with myself?

Scarlet Witch: This Stephen is an excellent teacher as well, Illyana. He helped me bring some order to my Chaos Magic. I'm sure he can do the same for you. 

Magik: It's not order I'm looking for, Wanda. It's efficiency. Binding our foes so they can't escape my wrath. 

Doctor Strange: Spoken like a true Queen of Limbo. Now, come, my child. You have much to learn... and very little time to master it...
100044.zh-Hans:
奇异博士：拉斯普廷小姐，我有什么可以为你效劳？

魔剑客：我想知道如何施展赛托拉克的猩红锁链。

奇异博士：这个咒语……是我从未传授给任何学生的……

魔剑客：不，你传授过。在我所在的时间线里，你曾教我驱使赛托拉克之力……就在那个你战死沙场之前。

奇异博士：而你的训练并未完成，我明白了。我……为你的损失感到遗憾……当然，也为那个版本的我…… 

魔剑客：我也一样。在我的时间线，史蒂芬·斯特兰奇是一个强大的法师，一个卓越的导师……更是一个伟大的人……

奇异博士：既然那个时空的我认定你能驾驭此咒，我又怎能违背自己的判断？

猩红女巫：伊丽亚娜，这位史蒂芬同样是一位卓越的导师。他曾帮我在混沌魔法中塑造秩序。我相信他也能为你做到。

魔剑客：我要的不是秩序，旺达，而是效率。我要敌人在我的怒火之下身受束缚，无处可逃。

奇异博士：地狱边境的女王如是说。来吧，我的孩子。你还有太多要学......而留给你掌握它们的时间已经所剩无几......

100046.en:
DAREDEVIL: You're dangerously close to entering the Eighth City, Punisher. The people there are under my protection. 

PUNISHER: Including the Clan Yashida assassin I’ve been trailin’? Since when have you harbored criminals, Devil? 

DAREDEVIL: Since my path to redemption brought me here and made me their keeper.

PUNISHER: Funny. The Matt Murdock I used to know would never let a killer run free. Then again, that Matt wouldn’t have fought nearly as dirty as you either. So maybe the new you ain't all bad... 

DAREDEVIL: I’m not sure I should take that as a compliment. 

PUNISHER: I don’t care how ya take it… as long as you hand over the punk I’ve been lookin’ for. 

DAREDEVIL: Before I do, perhaps you should look harder… 

PUNISHER: Hey! Get your hands off me! What do you think you’re -- ? Whoa. When you touched me… It's like I could see him inside my head… Is this some sorta magic trick? Or is this how you've been seein' the world all along? Either way, that jerk is here… but he's makin’ a new life for himself… followin’ the rules… startin’ a family… But … 

DAREDEVIL: Everyone can change for the better, Castle. Including you. If you choose to. 

PUNISHER: … Fine. You can keep him. But I saw somethin’ else when you touched me. Somethin’ nasty... and familiar. And it’s inside of you. Better not let it out, pal… or next time you’ll be the one I’m huntin’…
100046.zh-Hans:
夜魔侠：再靠近第八城一步，我就不客气了，惩罚者。城里的所有人现在都受我保护。

惩罚者：包括那个矢志田家族的刺客？你知道我追了他多久吗？你什么时候开始包庇罪犯了，恶魔？

夜魔侠：自从我踏上救赎之路来到这里，我就成为了他们的守护者。

惩罚者：有意思，我认识的马特·默多克绝不会放任一个杀手逍遥法外。但话又说回来，那个马特打人也没有你这么狠，所以你虽然面目全非，但也并非一无是处…… 

夜魔侠：这不像是在夸我。

惩罚者：随你怎么想……把我要的混蛋交出来就行。

夜魔侠：在那之前，我想你应该用心看看......

惩罚者：嘿！把手拿开！你以为你……等等，你真能让我……在脑海里看见他……？这是什么把戏？难道……你一直都是用这种方式看待世界的？无所谓，我知道他藏在哪了……等等，他现在……组建了家庭……遵守着你们的规则……开启了新的生活……可是…… 

夜魔侠：每个人都能改过自新，卡斯特，包括你。只要你愿意。

惩罚者：……哼，我可以放他一马。不过，你碰我的时候，我还看见了些别的东西，恶心……却又熟悉。你最好永远把它关在你的体内，伙计……否则，我的下一个猎物就是你……

100047.en:
NAMOR: Hela. I would have words with you. 

HELA: How dare you invade my privacy? This cell is my sanctuary! 

NAMOR: It is your prison. One that I could help you escape. But this old Atlantean magic I have used to contact you will not last long…  

HELA: Then speak before I wipe away the puddle you’ve appeared in. 

NAMOR: I present you a simple offer. I will help liberate you from the Eighth City. In return, you will lend me your ship of the dead, Naglfar, to aid in my conquest of Midgard.

HELA: I know you, Son of Atlantis. I have heard your name whispered by Hvergelmir, whence all waters rise. I have heard your deeds praised by Elivagar, whence all rivers diverge. The question is, do you know me? If you do, you would not dare to consider me a prisoner and insult me with such an offer. I have my own way out — no need for your intervention. But I am willing to present you a counteroffer... A deal, from a Queen to a King.

NAMOR: Please, do go on…  

HELA: I shall strengthen your trident, giving you the power to command the dead of the deep sea. All I ask from you is a simple favor… when the time comes…

NAMOR: I would be a fool to refuse. 

HELA: A fool, indeed.
100047.zh-Hans:
纳摩：海拉，我想和你谈谈。  

海拉：你竟敢不打招呼就闯进这里？第八城是我的庇护所！  

纳摩：也是囚禁你的牢笼，而我刚好可以帮你逃出来。如果你还要继续废话的话，我们的联络可维持不了多久，这是一种古老的亚特兰蒂斯魔法……

海拉：那就有话直说，趁我还没有把你的脸从这滩水渍里擦掉。

纳摩：我有一个简单的提议。我可以把你从第八城里救出来，作为交换，我需要你把亡者之船纳迦法借给我，帮我征服中庭。

海拉：我了解你，亚特兰蒂斯之子。你的名字曾被众水之源“赫瓦格密尔”的泉眼低语，你的功绩曾被衮衮大川“埃利伐加尔”的浪花传颂。问题在于——你是否了解我？如果你真的了解，又怎么敢将我视作囚徒，用这样荒谬的提议羞辱我？我想离开这里的时候，自然有办法离开，无需你插手。但我愿意回敬你一个新的提议，一个国王与另一位国王之间的平等交易。

纳摩：那么，请继续说……  

海拉：我会为你的三叉戟送上祝福，赋予你统御深海亡灵的威能。作为回报，你只需要在时机成熟时，还我一个简单的人情就好……

纳摩：只有蠢货才会拒绝。 

海拉：是的，只有蠢货才会拒绝。

100051.en:
"My avatar is in danger," a voice unexpectedly said inside of Blade's head. The Daywalker didn't know who it belonged to at first, until images of a battle-weary Moon Knight suddenly appeared in his mind. 

"Khonshu?" Blade asked. "That you?"

"Indeed," the Egyptian God of the Moon replied. "It seems my Fist has spoken of me."

"Yeah," Blade said. "Spector can't shut up about you. Doesn't always have the nicest things to say either..."

"What he thinks of me matters not," Khonshu said. "What he does for me is my only concern. But even with my blessing, he may not survive the battle at hand."

"If anyone can scrap his way through a fight, it's him," Blade said. 

"I am not so sure about that..." Khonshu replied. 

Worried, Blade rushed through the streets of New York to find Moon Knight, eventually seeing his ally in the distance, his white cape in tatters, besieged from all sides by a horde of ravenous vampires. Blade knew he wouldn't have time to reach Moon Knight. Even drawing his gun and firing at the bloodthirsty foes would be too little too late. 

"I cannot risk losing my most devoted disciple," Khonshu said, "and if that means taking on another to serve me, so be it. Will you accept?"

"Servin' gods ain't exactly my style," Blade said, "but I don't see another option. Let's do this... before I change my mind..."

Suddenly, all time seemed to stop as Blade began to feel Khonshu's divine power flowing through him. Blade drew his sword, releasing a wave of crescent moon-shaped blades in the direction of Moon Knight and his attackers. The Moon Blades ricocheted between the vampires, easily ending the assault on Khonshu's original avatar. 

"What... what happened...?" Moon Knight asked, pulling himself up to his feet. 

"Turns out that voice inside of your head was real after all," Blade replied. "And he hooked me up!"

"I'm not surprised," Moon Knight said. "Khonshu's told me before that he admires you. I always thought he wanted to replace me with you."

"None could ever take your place, my Moon Knight," Khonshu said reassuringly. "But imagine how mighty our vengeance could be with two fists instead of one!"
100051.zh-Hans:
“我的化身危在旦夕。”一个陌生声音突然在刀锋战士脑中响起。这位日行者尚未辨明声音来源，眼前便骤然浮现出身陷重围的月光骑士苦苦支撑的画面。

“孔苏？”刀锋试探道，“是你？”

“正是。”这位埃及月神回应，“看来孔苏之拳的确没忘了传播我的教义。”

“确实，”刀锋战士挑眉，“史贝特整天把你挂嘴边，虽然说的不总是好话……”

“他的言辞无关紧要，”孔苏声如洪钟，“唯有侍奉值得关注。然而纵有我的神力加持，此战他仍有可能命丧黄泉。”

“要说谁能在绝境之中杀出重围，”刀锋战士挥舞银剑斩杀了一只袭来的吸血鬼，“那非他莫属。”

“此次不同往日……”孔苏低语。

刀锋战士疾驰着穿梭于纽约的大街小巷，寻找着月光骑士。终于，刀锋战士远远望见这位盟友：他沾染血迹的雪白披风已被撕成条条褴褛，随着他的蹒跚闪躲在狂风中飘扬。月光骑士四周环绕着饥渴的吸血鬼大军，而它们似乎只是在玩弄掌中的猎物。随着月光骑士终于力竭倒下，刀锋战士心知救援不及，就连拔枪射击也为时已晚。

“我不能冒险再失去一位最虔诚的祭司，” 孔苏沉声道，“若必须另寻侍者，那便如此吧。刀锋战士，你可愿接受？“

“我可没什么侍奉神明的癖好，”刀锋战士冷笑着，“但眼下别无选择。趁我还没反悔......动手吧！”

时间仿佛骤然凝滞，刀锋战士感受到孔苏之力如潮水般涌贯全身。紧接着刀锋战士连续挥剑劈砍，一道道新月形光刃斩向月光骑士四周，银辉在吸血鬼间弹射，顷刻瓦解了对孔苏化身的围攻。

“怎......怎么回事......？”月光骑士挣扎着站起身。

“看来你脑子里的那个声音真的存在，”刀锋战士回答道。“而且他还帮了我一把！”

“毫不意外，”月光骑士抹去面甲上的血渍，“孔苏早就透露过对你的赏识。我总觉得他想让你取代我，看来这下他终于如愿以偿了。”

“无人能取代你的位置，我的月光骑士，”孔苏安抚道，“但试想，若我能再次双拳并举，我们的复仇伟力将何等辉煌！”

100052.en:
"What have you gotten yourself into this time, Logan?" Black Widow whispered as she looked through the scope of her sniper rifle. She had found the perfect vantage point to pick off a squad of Public Eye officers from a safe distance, but while she had removed herself from the heart of the battle, Wolverine had failed to do the same. In fact, his berserker attack had drawn all of the corrupt lawmen toward him. 

This wasn't the first time her Adamantium-clawed ally had put himself directly in the line of fire. Since he arrived in the year 2099 alongside the rest of his fellow Mutants, Wolverine had been caught in the crossfire on numerous occasions. And while his healing factor always got him back on his feet, the wounds still hurt. If Black Widow allowed her friend to become collateral damage yet again, she feared he might reconsider his participation in her band of freedom fighters. 

Desperate for another solution, Black Widow remembered her recent visit to the planet Klyntar. There, she temporarily became the host to a small fraction of the Phoenix Force. And while she eventually relinquished that primal power, she still felt the slightest tinge of cosmic fire burning within her. As she closed her eyes and concentrated on the Phoenix's eternal flame, the chamber on her rifle began to glow...

Saying a quiet prayer in Russian, she pulled the weapon's trigger, unleashing a flaming bullet that soared directly toward the battlefield. As it reached its destination, it exploded in a dazzling display, instantly eliminating all of the Public Eye officers while leaving Wolverine unscathed. Black Widow watched through her scope as her friend's initial frustration gave way to relief as he realized that the he wasn’t injured by the explosion. In fact, the power of the Phoenix Force had accelerated his recovery!

Black Widow quickly turned as the Phoenix herself descended from the sky behind her. By the look on her face, the Phoenix was caught off guard by the Widow’s use of her power... but she was eager to see how her former host might use her cosmic flame again...
100052.zh-Hans:
“这次你又惹上什么麻烦了，罗根？”黑寡妇低语道，调整着狙击步枪的瞄准镜。她已找到了绝佳的观察点，能在安全距离外精准击毙一整队公共之眼警员。虽然自己置身战局之外，她的队友金刚狼却难以脱身。不仅如此，他狂暴的攻击反而吸引了这些腐败执法者的全部火力。

这并非金刚狼第一次将自己暴露在火线前沿。自从这位挥舞着艾德曼合金利爪的战士与其他变种人一同来到2099时间线，他就不停地穿梭在枪林弹雨之中，为了这个世界的人们奋战。尽管自愈因子总能让他重整旗鼓，伤痛却依旧如影随形。黑寡妇明白，若再将这位朋友的感受置于不顾，他或许会重新考虑这群自由斗士是否值得追随。

情急之下，黑寡妇回忆起此前造览克林塔的经历，那时她曾短暂承载凤凰之力的一缕碎片。尽管最终归还了这股原始力量，她仍能感知体内微弱的宇宙余烬正在燃烧。她闭目凝神，用俄语默念祷词，呼唤着凤凰的永恒之火。而她的枪膛也随之泛起灼热的光芒......

黑寡妇扣动扳机，几颗裹挟烈焰的子弹划破长空坠入战场。子弹命中时爆发的炫目火焰瞬间吞噬所有公共之眼警员，但爆炸中心的金刚狼却毫发无伤。透过瞄准镜，她看见战友的神情从最初的恼怒转为惊讶——他不仅未被爆炸所伤，子弹上爆发的凤凰之力甚至加速了他伤口的愈合！

突然，黑寡妇警觉地转身，只见凤凰本尊自她身后的天空降临。她显然对黑寡妇运用其力量的方式感到意外……但她燃烧的眼眸里正跃动着期待，渴望着见证昔日宿主将如何再度运用这缕宇宙烈焰……

100053.en:
"Forge!" Emma Frost bellowed as she burst into the Mutant machinesmith's Krakoan workshop. "This had better be important. Do you know how valuable my time is?" 

"Right down to business then," Forge said, pulling out a small tube with a chunk of ice inside. "I've been studying an unusual sample that I recovered after your battle with Ultron. It's not Mutant in origin, so I wanted to find out exactly who and what —"

"Luna Snow," Emma said dryly. "I believe she calls it 'Dark Ice.'" 

"The K-Pop girl?" Forge said. "I knew she had sub-thermal abilities, but I had no idea what she generated was this complex."

"This is where you bore me to tears with your techno-babble, isn't it?" Emma asked. 

"If you insist," Forge teased. "Luna's cryokinetic power produces these polymorphic low-temperature organic crystals. In their stable form, they can repair organic tissue. But the crystals rapidly decompose under normal atmospheric conditions, absorbing light and heat in the process, freezing everything in their path."

"So informative," Emma said. "What does this have to do with me?"

"The composition of Dark Ice is remarkably similar to your organic diamond form," Forge continued. "Since you can keep your own crystalline structure stable, you might also be able to temporarily stabilize the Dark Ice upon contact. You wouldn't have total control like Luna, but you might be able to tap into some of its abilities."

"And you want me to help test your theory?" Emma asked, her eyebrow arching high. "I think not."

"You might not have a choice..." Forge said as the container unexpectedly shattered, spreading a deep chill through his workshop. 

"Fine," Emma said, pushing past Forge. "I'll save the day. As usual."

As Emma grabbed hold of the Dark Ice, the workshop instantly began to thaw.

"Looks like my theory was correct," Forge said. "As usual."

"And what am I supposed to do with this now?" Emma asked, looking at the shard of Dark Ice glowing in her hand. 

"Honestly," Forge replied, "anything you want."

Emma reached out her hand, effortlessly unleashing a torrent of Dark Ice that formed into a giant wall in front of her. For the first time since she entered Forge's workshop, Emma Frost smiled.
100053.zh-Hans:
“锻造者！”白皇后猛然推开大门，闯入这位变种人机械师在克拉科的工坊，厉声道，“你最好真的有什么要紧事。知道我的时间有多宝贵吗？”

“商人说话总是这么直接。”锻造者见怪不怪，一边回答一边取出了一支装有冰晶的试管，“奥创入侵结束后，我从战场上回收了一份特殊样本。它并非变种人能力的产物，所以我想要弄清楚它的主人到底是谁……”

“冰月花雪。”艾玛冷漠地打断，“我记得她把这种物质称为‘暗冰’。”

“那个韩流歌手？”锻造者讶异，“我听说过她的低温异能，但没想到她生成的物质竟如此复杂。”

“又准备用你那些科技术语给我催眠了？”艾玛翻了个白眼。

“那我可恭敬不如从命了。”锻造者笑了笑，“冰月花雪使用冰冻能力时会产生一种多态低温有机晶体。这种晶体在稳定状态下能修复生物组织，但它也会在常压下快速分解，同时吸收光与热，冻结周遭的一切。”

“真新鲜。”艾玛说，“所以这和我有什么关系？”

“暗冰的分子构成与你有机钻石形态惊人地相似，”锻造者继续解释，“既然你能维持自身晶体结构稳定，或许也能在接触时暂时稳定暗冰。虽然你无法像冰月花雪那样对其掌控自如，但或许可以尝试调用它的部分能力……”

“所以你想让我来验证这个理论？”艾玛挑眉，“别做梦了。”

“你恐怕别无选择……”锻造者的语气突然变得紧张，而他话音未落容器便突然爆裂，刺骨寒意瞬间席卷整个工坊。

“好吧。”艾玛一把推开锻造者箭步向前，“什么烂摊子都得我来收拾，一如既往。”

她击碎不断蔓延的寒冰，伸手握住了那片黑色的晶体。而在她接触到暗冰的瞬间，工坊里的冰霜即刻开始消融。

“看来我的理论没错。”锻造者舒了口气， “一如既往。”

“那我现在该拿这玩意儿怎么办？”艾玛凝视着手中幽光流转的暗冰碎片。

“说实话。”锻造者摊手，“你想怎么办都行。”

艾玛轻轻抬手，暗冰如洪流般奔涌而出，在她面前凝成一道巨大的钻石冰墙。这大概是头一次，艾玛·弗斯特在参观锻造者的工坊时竟然露出了笑容。

100054.en:
"Thought Daredevil said he took all of these Hand losers out already," Cloak said as he enveloped several red-clad ninjas in the darkness of his body. 

"In his own timeline, maybe," Dagger replied, hurling Lightforce projectiles at another wave of oncoming Hand warriors. "But this reality is clearly still teeming with them."

"Well, we're not gonna last much longer against 'em," Hawkeye said, gesturing toward the quiver on his back. "I'm all outta arrows... which means we are officially outnumbered."

"Outnumbered," Psylocke responded. "But not outmatched. Unless the tales you've told us about your skills with a sword have been exaggerated..."

Hawkeye grabbed the hilt of his katana and unsheathed it, its silver blade catching a glint of moonlight as he brought it to attack position.

"I guess I could go full Ronin for a while," Hawkeye said, remembering the brief time he wore a different costume and used another name. "But as good as I am with the ol' slice and dice, I'm not sure I stand a chance against neverending horde of magic ninjas with the power to come back from the dead."

"Maybe we can help you with that," Dagger suggested. "If Cloak and I channel our powers into your sword, Ty's Darkforce might be able to suppress the Hand's mystical ability to regenerate."

"So, once we take 'em down," Cloak said, "they'll stay down."

"And my Lightforce could give the rest of us a much needed boost along the way," Dagger added. 

"So it'll help us regain our strength AND weaken our enemies?" Hawkeye asked. "Sounds perfect. Too perfect. What's the catch?"

"Well, it's just a theory so far," Dagger admitted. "We've never actually tested it on anyone else and don't know what will happen."

"Whatever it does," Hawkeye said with a shrug, "it's gotta be better than this."

"And if it is a success," Psylocke added, "I will gladly be next in line for an upgrade!"
100054.zh-Hans:
“我还以为夜魔侠已经把这些手合会的渣滓清理干净了！” 斗篷说着将几名红衣忍者吞没在体内的黑暗之中。

“在他自己的时间线里或许如此，”匕首一边回答，一边向另一波迎面而来的手合会忍者掷出光刃，“但这条时间线显然还有不少漏网之鱼。”

“我们撑不了多久了，”鹰眼指了指背后空荡荡的箭袋，“箭矢用尽……我庄严宣布：这场战斗正式敌众我寡了！”

“只是敌众我寡，”灵蝶淡然接话，“并不代表寡不敌众。除非你先前吹嘘的剑术造诣都是夸大其词......”

鹰眼反手抽刀出鞘，摆出攻击架势，月华在银色利刃上流转成凛冽寒光。

“唉，看来我得暂时当回浪人了，”他想起那段化名漂泊的岁月，“不过就算我刀工再好，恐怕也敌不过这群层出不穷还能不断复生的魔法忍者大军。”

“或许我们可以帮上忙，”匕首提议，“如果我和斗篷将力量注入你的剑中，泰的黑暗之力或许能压制手合会的再生邪术。”

“这样一来，”斗篷接话，“只要他们被打倒，就再也爬不起来了。”

“与此同时，我的光明之力也能在战斗中为大家补充体力！”匕首补充道。

“既能强化战友又能削弱敌人？”鹰眼挑眉，“哪有这种好事？这背后肯定有猫腻，快说吧！”

“好吧，这目前只是理论上可行，”匕首坦言，“我们从未真正在他人身上测试过，也不知道究竟会发生什么。”

“管它会怎样，”鹰眼耸耸肩，“总比现在强。”

“若真能成功，”灵蝶笑着说，“我很乐意成为你们下一个强化对象！”

100055.en:
"You an' me, we need to talk, Erik," Gambit said, his intense red eyes fixed on Magneto. 

"Now is not the time, Remy," Magneto said as he used his Mutant power to unleash a hailstorm of metallic debris toward the Grandmaster's goons. "I am busy fighting for the future of our people!"

"Some of 'em, maybe," Gambit said, effortlessly hurling a charged playing card at another cosmic enforcer, "but you’re leavin' others high an' dry." 

"Ah, this is about Rogue..." Magneto said, realizing what was bothering his fellow X-Man. 

"She's the only thing we got in common," Gambit replied. "Difference is, I wanna protect that girl, while you banned her from returnin' home to Krakoa!"

 "It was for good reason," Magneto argued, his focus still on the battle raging around them. "I couldn't let Krakoa become the next Grand Garden. Her powers are out of control." 

"You wanna see out of control?" Gambit asked, preforming an acrobatic leap over Magneto and grabbing the giant sword right off the Master of Magnetism's back. "Lemme show you!"

Gambit used his Mutant power to convert the potential energy within Magneto's greatsword into volatile kinetic energy. Its haunting glow on Gambit’s face showed Magneto just how serious his friend was. 

"You don’t know what you're doing," Magneto snapped, using his abilities to rip the fully-charged weapon out of Gambit’s hands, sending it hurling across the battlefield. As it impacted a distant wall, it exploded in a massive burst of energy. Magneto summoned back the fractured pieces of his sword, instantly reassembling it in his grip. 

"I know exactly what I'm doin'," Gambit said. "An' next time, I won' be holdin' back!"

"There will not be a next time," Magneto said, sheathing his weapon once more. "I have faith that we can resolve our differences without fighting. You are a man of honor, Remy. That is why I gave you and Rogue my blessing... And it is why I know we will forge ahead toward a solution... together."  

Taken aback by Magneto’s words, Gambit grumbled under his breath and began to walk away. He may not have gotten the fight he was itching for, but deep down, he hoped Magneto was right. After all, Rogue's future depended on it...
100055.zh-Hans:
“我们得谈谈，埃里克。”牌皇猩红的眼眸紧紧盯着万磁王。

“现在不是时候，雷米。”万磁王将天尊花园的金属结构撕成万千碎片，操纵它们如冰雹般砸向高天尊的卫兵，“我正在为我们族群的未来而战！”

“只是部分族群的未来，”牌皇甩出一张充能纸牌，另一个卫兵应声倒地，“你让其他人无家可归。”

“啊，你是为了小淘气来兴师问罪的……”万磁王终于明白这位战友的怒火从何而来。

“她是我和你唯一的交集，”牌皇指间跃动着炫目的能量光芒，“区别在于我想保护她，而你却禁止她返回克拉科！”

“你知道这事出有因，”万磁王始终关注着周围激烈的战局，“我不能让克拉科变成第二个天尊花园，她的能力正在失控。”

“失控？！”牌皇话音未落便纵身一跃，掠过万磁王的头顶，顺势从这位磁场操纵者的背上攥下巨剑，“我这就让你见识见识真正的失控！”

牌皇动用变种能力，将万磁王巨剑中蕴含的磁力势能转化为狂躁的动能。万磁王望着投射在牌皇脸上逐渐浓郁的紫色光芒，明白了他的朋友究竟有多认真。

“你根本不明白自己在做什么！”万磁王厉声喝道，操控磁力从牌皇手中夺过充能巨剑，将其掷向战场彼端，巨剑随即在敌群之中爆发出惊天能量。紧接着，随着万磁王的召唤，破碎的剑刃如归巢群鸟般回到他手中，瞬间重铸完整。

“我很清楚自己在做什么，”牌皇沉声说，“而下次我绝不会再留手。”

“不会有下次了。”万磁王将巨剑收回背后，“我知道我们能和平地解决分歧。你是个有情有义的人，雷米，正因如此我才会祝福你和小淘气的婚姻......也正因如此，我确信我们终将携手开辟出解决之道。”

牌皇闻言一怔，嘟囔着转身离去。虽未如愿以偿地打上一架，但他心底却期盼万磁王是对的——毕竟，这关乎小淘气的未来。

100057.en:
"Peni! Just the alternate reality Parker I was looking for!" Spider-Man said as his young ally approached in her massive mechanical suit known as SP//dr.

Peni Parker hopped out of SP//dr's pilot seat, flipping through the air and gracefully landing right in front of her amazing Spider-Friend. 

"Peter-san!" Peni said with a grin. "I've been looking for you, too! I have good news!"

"Did you finally finish the armor I asked you to build me?" Spider-Man asked, barely able to contain his excitement. "We are gonna looks so awesome out there, fighting crime side-by-side in matching SP//dr suits! So… where is it?"

"Here," Peni responded sheepishly, blushing a bit as she held out her closed hand.

"That... might be a bit small for me…" Spider-Man said, scratching the top of his head in puzzlement as he looked at Peni's tiny fist. 

Peni opened her hand to reveal a small device contained within. Spider-Man picked it up and gave it a closer look.

"I've still got a long way to go before I can build you a fully-functional SP//dr suit," Peni admitted. "But in the meantime, I was hoping this might help you on the battlefield."

"What is it…?" Spider-Man asked as he started to fiddle with the small device. 

"It's a new weapon I developed specifically for you," Peni replied. "It's designed to attach like a Spider-Tracer to nearby enemies, boosting your attacks. And… oh… umm… you might not want to press that yet…"

"This?" Spider-Man said, clicking a small button on the device. "Why?"

"SPIDER-BOMB ACTIVATED," the device said. "COUNTDOWN INITIATED."

"That's why," Peni said with a smirk. 

"You could have told me it was a bomb!" Spider-Man yelled in a panic. 

"I thought it was obvious," Peni responded. 

"Clearly not," Spider-Man said, looking for somewhere safe to throw the device. "My Spidey-Sense must be on the fritz again!"

"Don't worry," Peni said. "It won't hurt you! I hope..."
 
With that, the bomb suddenly detonated, releasing a small energy burst. 

"I don't think it worked…" Spider-Man said as the energy faded. "It didn't do any damage. In fact, I actually think I feel better than I did before it went 'BOOM'!"

"That's kinda the point, Peter-san," Peni said with a giggle. "The real challenge is switching it between the healing pulse you just experienced and the destructive kinetic energy burst. But I'm sure you'll figure it out... eventually..."

"Darn right!" Spider-Man responded. "No sticky bomb is gonna stump me!"
100057.zh-Hans:
"潘妮，最最炫酷的平行宇宙帕克！我正巧在找你呢！"看到年轻盟友驾驶着巨大的SP//dr机甲靠近时，蜘蛛侠兴奋地喊道。

潘妮·帕克从SP//dr驾驶舱轻盈跃出，凌空翻了个跟头，稳稳落在她的神奇蜘蛛朋友面前。

"彼得先生！"潘妮咧嘴笑道，"我也刚要找你！告诉你个好消息……"

"你终于造好给我的机甲了？！"蜘蛛侠迫不及待地东张西望，"我和你穿着同款SP//dr机甲并肩战斗，那场面绝对酷毙了！那么……它在哪儿呢？"

“这儿呢。” 潘妮略显局促地伸出右手，里面似乎攥着什么东西。

"我穿这个……是不是有点太小了？"蜘蛛侠挠着头，困惑地端详着潘妮的紧握的拳头。

潘妮展开手掌，露出躺在掌心的小型装置。蜘蛛侠小心翼翼地拈起它，仔细打量着。

"要完成一件量身定制的SP//dr机甲还得花不少时间，"潘妮坦言道，"不过我先做了这个小装置，希望它能在战场上帮到你。"

"这是个什么东西？"蜘蛛侠摆弄着精巧的装置问道。

"一个专门为你研发的新武器！"潘妮解释着，"它可以在敌人身上附着一个类似蛛丝标记的东西，强化你对他们的攻击效果。还有……呃……你最好先别按那个……"

“按这个？”蜘蛛侠无意间按下了装置上的小按钮，“为什么？”

“‘黏黏炸弹’已激活，” 装置发出提示音，“倒计时开始。”

“现在你知道了。“潘妮坏笑着回答。

“你早说这是个炸弹啊！”蜘蛛侠惊慌失措地嚷道。

“这不是明摆着吗？”潘妮歪了歪头。

“显然不是！”蜘蛛侠焦急地环顾四周，试图寻找一个安全地方投掷这个炸弹，“我的蜘蛛感应怎么又失灵了？！”

"别担心，"潘妮眨眨眼，"它伤不到你的，大概吧……"

话音未落，炸弹骤然爆开，迸发出一道柔和的能量脉冲。

“嗯？这玩意儿是不是坏了……”能量脉冲散去后，蜘蛛侠活动着手脚说道，“它完全没伤到我。说实话，它炸了之后我好像更有劲儿了！”

“这就对了，彼得先生。”潘妮掩嘴轻笑，“制作这个装置真正的技术难点在于切换模式——你刚才体验到的是治疗脉冲，如果转换成破坏性冲击波的话……我相信你迟早会自己弄明白的！”

“那当然！”蜘蛛侠将装置抛起又稳稳接住，“区区一个粘性炸弹可难不倒我！”

100059.en:
"Where are these creatures coming from, Susan?" Doctor Strange asked as he conjured another magical barricade.

"Subterranea," Invisible Woman replied. "They're Moloids — the minions of the Mole Man. They usually keep to their underground kingdom and don't bother anyone. But with all of the construction that Fisk is doing in Lower Manhattan, they must've felt threatened."
 
 "And now they're attacking in hordes," Doctor Strange replied. "Just how many of these Moloids are there?"

"We've never been able to get a solid count," Invisible Woman said. "But Reed estimates it could be in the billions."

"I'm afraid the Shields of the Seraphim may not be adequate to hold back that many," Doctor Strange said.
 
"But my shields are," Invisible Woman said with confidence. She put a hand to her temple and focused, and an oncoming group of Moloids suddenly stopped in their tracks, unable to advance or retreat. It was as if they were confined within transparent walls.
 
"Impressive," Doctor Strange said. "If you can draw them closer to me, I may have another spell that could shift the winds in our favor..."

Invisible Woman manipulated her force field to drag the Moloids toward the Sorcerer Supreme, who was already busy casting a powerful spell — the Maelstrom of Madness. As the creatures were swept up in the chaos, Invisible Woman held them in place with her shields. Yet despite being trapped in the violent tempest, the Moloids refused to surrender. 

"They are stronger than they look..." Doctor Strange said. "Perhaps we need another plan."

"No, Stephen," Invisible Woman replied. "We just need to weather this storm together to the very end."

With that, Invisible Woman released all of her psionic energy, causing a powerful explosion within the mystical maelstrom. When the winds settled, all of the Moloids lay defeated at last.
100059.zh-Hans:
“这些生物到底从哪来的，苏珊？”奇异博士说着构筑起又一道魔法屏障，挡住敌人滔滔不绝的攻势。

“地下王国，”隐形女答道，“它们是地底人——鼹鼠人的仆从，一般只在地下活动，与世无争。多半是菲斯克在曼哈顿下城区大兴土木激怒了它们。”

“金并打扰它们睡懒觉，它们却跑来找我们讨说法了？”奇异博士苦笑着，“这地底......到底有多少人？”

“我们从来没有掌握过它们的确切数量，”隐形女说，“但根据里德的统计，可能有数十亿。”

“我的炽天使之盾恐怕挡不住这么多人。”奇异博士沉声道。

“但我的力场可以。”隐形女自信地轻触额角，专注凝神。一批汹涌而来的地底人浪潮骤然停滞，进退不得，如同被关进了一个透明囚笼。

“了不起，”奇异博士赞许道，“我有一道咒术或许可以扭转战局，只要你能把它们引到我周围……”

隐形女当即操纵力场，将地底人拖向这位至尊法师，而后者早已心领神会地开始吟唱咒语。当地底人被聚集在他周围时，汹涌的黑暗魔法从奇异博士的身体里喷薄而出，以他为中心形成了一片黑色漩涡。而隐形女也维持力场束缚着地底人们，将它们不断拖入黑暗漩涡之中。但即便被困于狂暴的魔法乱流中，地底人们依然在负隅顽抗。

“它们比看上去更难应付……”奇异博士咬着牙，维持着法术，“或许我们需要一个新对策。”

“不，史蒂芬，”隐形女高声道，“我们只需坚守阵线，直至风暴平息！”

话音未落，隐形女释放全部心灵能量，在魔法漩涡中引发剧烈爆炸，一举击溃了漩涡里所有的地底人。而随着尘埃落定，残余的地底人们早就落荒而逃了。

100060.en:
"I thought Daredevil said he took out all of these losers," the Thing grumbled as he punched yet another sword-wielding ninja with his rocky fists. 

"A cult like the Hand always has more disciples in waiting," Black Panther replied, furiously slashing his claws at his red-hooded attackers. "And they seem desperate to reclaim the power they once held in their collapsing timeline."

"Hulk doesn't care what stupid sword guys want," Hulk said. "But Hulk knows what they'll get..."

"Clobbered?" Thing asked with a smile.

"SMASHED!" Hulk bellowed as he hit the ground with his giant fists, knocking several ninjas off-balance. 

"Eh. Same diff," Thing said, rushing in and beating down the disoriented ninjas with his bare knuckles. 

Once the battle was over, the Thing looked down at his aching fists. His rocky hide had been sliced to the point where the outer layer was beginning to peel away.

"You are hurt, my friend," the Black Panther said.

"Huh. Guess the swords of theirs are sharper than I thought," Thing said, trying to shake off the pain. 

"You must take time to recover," Black Panther insisted. "We can handle the fight from here."

"Nah," Thing said. "I ain't never thrown in the towel before. Not gonna start now 'cuz I got a few scrapes."

"I... trust your judgement..." Black Panther responded reluctantly. 

"Hulk doesn't," Hulk said. "Grimm's always been stupid. And ugly."
 
"Look who's talkin', Green Genes," Thing chuckled. 

"But Hulk is smart," Hulk continued. "Hulk can give Grimm some of his gamma energy to heal Grimm's hands and make him stronger."

"Stronger than you?" Thing asked, raising a rocky eyebrow. 

"Never!" Hulk snarled. "Hulk is the strongest there is!"

"We'll see about that, pal..." Thing said as the next wave of Hand ninjas leapt into action, "...'cuz It’s Smashin' Time!"
100060.zh-Hans:
“我明明记得夜魔侠说过他把这些杂碎都清理干净了。”石头人一边抱怨，一边打出一记坚岩刺拳，一个挥舞着武士刀的恶魔忍者应声倒地。

“手合会这样的邪教永远都有人在排队等号，”黑豹挥动利爪劈开又一位红衣袭击者的攻势，沉声应道，“他们不惜代价要重建被夜魔侠覆灭的一切。”

“浩克才不管耍剑的蠢货想要什么，”浩克吼道，“但浩克知道他们会得到什么……”

“痛扁？”石头人咧嘴笑问。

“砸——扁——！”浩克怒吼着，双拳捶地，爆发的冲击震晕了他面前的大批恶魔忍者。

“呃，大差不差吧。”石头人说着冲上前去，一拳一个将晕头转向的恶魔忍者们逐一撂倒。

手合会的攻势告一段落时，石头人终于有功夫检查自己隐隐作痛的双拳。他的石质皮肤已被利刃劈砍出无数裂痕，最外层的表皮开始片片剥落。

“你受伤了，我的朋友。”黑豹关切道。

“呵，看来他们的破刀比我想的锋利点儿。”石头人甩了甩手，试图忽略手上传来的剧痛。

“不要小瞧恶魔之力的加持，本。你必须歇一歇，休整恢复，”黑豹坚持道，“把接下来的战斗交给我们。”

“用不着，”石头人粗声拒绝，“我这辈子从没认过输，可不会因为蹭破点皮就开这个头。”

“我……尊重你的判断……”黑豹迟疑地回应。

“浩克不尊重，”浩克插话，“格里姆总是看起来很蠢，还很丑。”

“好意思说我？你这绿皮怪。”石头人笑出了声。

“但浩克很聪明，”浩克接着说，“浩克可以分点伽马能量给格里姆，治好他的手，让他变强点。”

“比你还强？”石头人挑起岩石眉毛。

“不可能！”浩克龇着牙，“浩克最强！”

“走着瞧吧，伙计……”石头人话音未落，新一波的手合会恶魔忍者已凌空扑来，“……砸扁时间到！”

100061.en:
"Let's see…" Deadpool said as he dug through a crate of bizarre weapons that he had salvaged from across the Chronoverse. "There has to be something useful in here somewhere. A Twilight Sword or a Cosmic Cube or —"

"Mrrr!" Jeff exclaimed as Deadpool tossed a large stuffed unicorn from the crate. 

"Aww! You like the magic horsey, Jeff?" Deadpool asked as he watched his Land Shark companion nuzzle up against the plushy polyester plaything. "All yours!" 

"MRRRR!" Jeff barked with glee, chomping his jaws down on the plush toy's front leg. 

As Jeff continued to gnaw on the unicorn, it suddenly repeated the noise Jeff had just made: "MRRRR!"  

"Whoa! Wait a second!" Deadpool said, abandoning his search. "Did that thing just record and replay your adorable little shark mumbles? Lemme try!"

Deadpool gave the unicorn's leg a squeeze and uttered something so utterly obscene it made Jeff blush. A moment later, the unicorn was repeating the same words that had just poured out of Deadpool's filthy mouth.

"Who needs an Infinity Gauntlet?" Deadpool said, kicking over his crate. "I just found my perfect weapon. One that can annoy my enemies to death with my trademark charm and wit!" 
 
Deadpool and Jeff continued to take turns, recording strange phrases and playing them back until their sides were splitting with laughter. But not everyone was amused. 

Elsa Bloodstone was nearby polishing her weapons, and after an hour of the duo's incoherent ramblings, she had reached her limit. She attacked Deadpool with a sudden strike, tying him up, and gagging his mouth with her breathing gun.

"If you like the sound of your voice so bloody much," Elsa said. "let's see how long it takes before it drives you insane. Jeff… A little help?"

Elsa tossed the unicorn plush to Jeff, who bit down hard on its plush paw, forcing the captive Deadpool to listen to his own voice on a constant loop. Jeff stayed unusually cheerful throughout the act of psychological torture, completely unaware that this was anything more than just another friendly game. As he played Deadpool's recorded words over and over, Jeff happily mimicked them in his own language. 

"MFKK IK STFP!" Deadpool begged through the gag. But it was useless. Elsa wasn't about to let his suffereing end anytime soon. 

Days later, once Deadpool had finally broken down under his own endless nonsense, a satisfied Elsa yanked the breathing gun from his mouth… completely unaware that her weapon was now pulsing with a mysterious red glow…
100061.zh-Hans:
"让我瞧瞧……"死侍一边嘟囔一边翻找着一箱从纠缠宇宙各处搜刮来的古怪武器，"这里边总该有点好东西，暮光之剑或者宇宙立方之类的……"

"嗷呜！" 当死侍从箱子里刨出一只巨大的独角兽毛绒玩具时，杰夫兴奋地叫出了声。

“噢——！你喜欢这只魔法小马吗，杰夫？”死侍看着陆行鲨伙伴用鼻子亲昵地蹭着这只毛绒玩具，大手一挥：“送你啦！”

“嗷呜呜！”杰夫一口咬住了毛绒玩具的前腿，心满意足地哼哼着。

正当杰夫继续啃咬独角兽时，玩具突然重复了杰夫刚才的叫声："嗷呜呜！"

"哇噢！等一下！"死侍立刻停止了翻找，"这玩意儿是不是在回放你可爱的鲨鱼咕噜？让我试试！"

死侍捏了捏独角兽的前腿，吐出一连串不堪入耳的污言秽语，听得杰夫背鳍都泛了红。下一秒，独角兽原封不动地复述出刚从死侍的脏嘴里蹦出来的话。

“还要什么无限手套！”死侍一脚踹翻武器箱，双手高举毛绒玩具，“这才是我梦寐以求的终极兵器！有了它，我终于能够施展我无与伦比的机智和魅力烦死所有敌人！”

死侍和杰夫轮流录制着各种怪腔怪调，反复回放直到笑得直不起腰。但并非所有人都觉得有趣。

艾尔莎·血石正在附近擦拭着武器，听了这对活宝一小时的胡言乱语后，她终于忍无可忍。艾尔莎骤然出手放倒死侍，把他捆成粽子，接着用呼吸枪塞住了他的嘴。

"既然你这么痴迷自己该死的噪音，"艾尔莎冷笑着，"不如我们来试试它多久能烦死你自己。杰夫……帮个小忙？"

艾尔莎把独角兽抛给杰夫，陆行鲨立刻跳起来咬住它的毛绒蹄子，迫使动弹不得的死侍听着自己的垃圾话无限循环。在这场折磨中，杰夫始终异常欢快，全然把这当成了和死侍的又一场新游戏。每当死侍的录音再一次响起，它都开心地用陆行鲨语学着哼哼。

“唔！腾哈！放嗨唔！” 被枪管塞住嘴巴的死侍含糊地哀求着，但毫无用处。艾尔莎显然不打算轻易让他解脱。

数日后，在自己无尽的胡言乱语下，死侍的眼睛终于失去了高光。心满意足的艾尔莎悠哉出现，猛然抽回了呼吸枪，却没有察觉这把武器如今正泛着神秘的红光……

100062.en:
"Thank you for letting me use your ship for this data collection mission," Mister Fantastic said. 

"No prob, Reed," Star-Lord replied. "The Milano was built for deep space exploration."

"Was it built to withstand a quantum asteroid belt?" Mister Fantastic asked. 

"Of course!" Star-Lord responded. "I mean, Probably. Well, honestly, I’m not sure. Why?"
 
"'Cause we’re about to find out!" Rocket Raccoon yelled as he raced into the cockpit.

"I was just following Reed's coordinates!" Star-Lord insisted as he and Rocket maneuvered the ship through the field of space rocks.
 
"I must've made a minor miscalculation," Mister Fantastic admitted. 

"Well, that minor miscalculation's about to become a major disaster!" Rocket exclaimed.

A giant meteor headed straight toward the spacecraft. The Milano rapidly descended, narrowly avoiding a head-on collision. But the meteor impacted the top of the hull, creating a gaping hole in the ceiling above them. Without a thought, Mister Fantastic stretched his body wide enough to cover the breach. 

"Okay," Star-Lord said a few minutes later. "The shields are on. You can relax now."
 
"No, I can't," Mister Fantastic replied. "The prolonged exposure to the vacuum of space has left part of my body frozen solid. If I tried to return to my normal shape now, there's no telling how much trauma my physiology might suffer."

"I got just the thing ya need," Rocket said, rummaging through his gadgets. "This Elasticity Amplifier I built should enhance your flexibility under extreme conditions. And might even come in handy later..."

"Thank you, Rocket," Mister Fantastic said, activating the device and instantly restoring his body to its natural state. "You truly are the genius everyone says you are."

"Hear that, Quill?" Rocket said proudly. "If this guy says I'm a genius, it must be true! Time to start treatin' me like one!"
100062.zh-Hans:
“再次感谢你们让我搭乘米兰诺号，这次数据收集任务对我的研究至关重要。”神奇先生说道。

“小事一桩，里德，”星爵回应，“米兰诺号本就是为深空探索打造的。”

“呃，那它能扛住量子小行星带吗？”神奇先生望向舷窗，脸色微变，迟疑地问道。

“当然！”星爵脱口而出，“我是说……可能吧。嘶，说实话，我不太确定。怎么了？”

“因为咱们马上就可以确定了！”火箭浣熊大喊着冲进驾驶舱。

“我只是在跟着里德的导航飞！”星爵一边争辩着，一边跳上驾驶座，与火箭合作操纵飞船在密集的陨石间穿梭。

“我的计算可能有些微小的误差。”神奇先生承认道。

“这些‘微小误差’马上要酿成大祸了！”火箭叫道。

一颗巨型陨石向飞船直冲而来。米兰诺号急速俯冲，堪堪避开了正面撞击。但陨石依旧擦过船体顶部，在他们头顶的舱壁撕开一道裂口。神奇先生见状不假思索地伸展躯体，瞬间化作密实的弹性薄膜封住了破口。

惊险的几分钟后，星爵松了口气：“好了，护盾系统重新上线，你可以放松了。”

“恐怕不行，”神奇先生吃力地回答，“长时间暴露在太空中彻底冻结了我的部分组织。如果现在强行恢复，我的生理结构可能遭受难以预估的创伤......”

“你还真别说，说不定我有东西能派上用场，”火箭在他的装备堆里翻找着，“哈！我之前造过一个弹性增幅器，能增强极端环境下的柔韧性。我本来想送给格鲁特，但是你拿着说不定更合适……”

“谢谢你，火箭。”神奇先生启动装置，身体瞬间恢复自然状态，“他们没说错，你确实是个天才！”

“听见没，奎尔？”火箭趾高气扬地看着星爵，“承认吧，如果里德·理查兹都说我是个天才，那我就是个天才！我劝你以后对天才客气点！”

100063.en:
Luna Snow realized she was in trouble. Well, more trouble than she had already been in.

When Mayor Wilson Fisk outlawed superhuman activity in Manhattan, Luna was one of the first to be locked in the maximum security prison called the Vault. A glimmer of hope returned when her fellow heroes staged a breakout, but she got separated from the other detainees amidst the chaos. And now, she was cornered by a group of the Kingpin’s guards.
 
"Should've stayed in your cell," the guard captain grunted.

"And you should've stayed in your lane," Luna said, her hands beginning to glow. 

"Remember the law," the captain warned. "No powers."

The guards lunged toward Luna, a restraining collar in the captain's hand. If he put it on her, it would suppress her superhuman abilities. She had no desire to harm normal humans, no matter what side of the battle they were on... but she might not have a choice. 

Just before she released a burst of dark ice, Luna Snow felt something shift within her. She felt lighter. More agile. She quickly dodged out of the guards' way, avoiding their assault. She was surprised by her own speed, but even more surprised when she saw a spirit fox standing beside her. The guards tried to attack again, but this time, Luna tapped into the ghostly creature's power to charm them, leaving them hypnotized and harmless.
 
"I couldn't intervene personally without causing an international incident," a voice said from the shadows. "But my friend here can lead you to safety."

Luna recognized the voice of her old teammate, White Fox, even before she saw her face. But this was no time for a reunion. It was time to run. And now, with the help of her new mystical companion, Luna Snow was swifter than ever.
100063.zh-Hans:
冰月花雪发现自己有麻烦了。准确地说，她早就有麻烦了，但是现在比之前更麻烦。

在威尔逊·菲斯克市长在曼哈顿的铁腕下，一大批超人类因为他推行的超人类禁令被关进了最高安全级别监狱——"穹顶"。不幸的是，雪希是最早被囚禁的人之一。当她的英雄同伴们发起这场史诗级越狱行动时，她终于又看到一线希望，直到她在混乱中与英雄们走散。而现在，她被一队全副武装的穹顶守卫逼到了绝路。

"你刚刚就该老老实实待在牢房里。"守卫队长粗声说。

"你们现在也该老老实实待在原地。"雪希说着，双手泛起微光。

"法令规定了，"队长警告道，攥紧了手上的武器，"不许使用超能力。"

守卫们一拥而上，在他们身后，队长拿着抑制项圈缓慢靠近着。这个可以抑制的特殊能力项圈就是金并关押超人类的秘诀。雪希不想伤害普通人，无论他们身处哪个阵营......但此刻她别无选择。

正当雪希准备释放一波暗冰冻结守卫们，她突然感觉自己的身体发生了一些变化。她似乎更轻盈了，更敏捷了。雪希精准地闪避开守卫们的每一次攻击，连她自己都对这速度感到惊讶。但更令她惊讶的是，她看到一只灵体狐狸出现在自己身边。守卫们重整旗鼓再次发起攻势，但这次雪希操控灵狐赋予的力量魅惑了他们，让他们陷入催眠状态，危险终于解除了。

"抱歉我不能亲自帮忙，一个外国情报机构负责人的介入恐怕会引发国际争端。"一个声音从阴影中传来，"但我的朋友可以护送你到安全的地方。"

虽然雪希没能看清对方的脸，但她仅凭声音就认出了她的老队友白狐。可是她现在没工夫叙旧，是时候离开这个鬼地方了。有了这个新伙伴的帮助，这次麻烦肯定追不上雪希！

100064.en:
Adam Warlock's heart sank as he looked out at the devastation before him. The Timestream Entanglement wasn't just causing timelines to collapse, it was causing the ecosystems that survived to fall severely out of balance. The climate across this Earth was changing rapidly, with much of the Eurasian continent facing severe drought. And though Adam and his fellow heroes had been on the frontlines fighting for the fate of reality itself, the very people they were trying to safeguard were still suffering. 

"Is there nothing we can do?" Adam asked, desperate to find a solution. He refused to save this world's inhabitants from impending extinction only to watch them succumb to the cruel whims of nature. 

"I have tried," Storm replied, "but this crisis is far too dire for one Mutant, goddess or otherwise, to handle on her own."

"Then let me be of assistance," Adam said, determined to help. "I can bond our souls, and if you are willing, perhaps our powers as well."

"I have been blessed with the full fury of the tempest," Storm warned. "Even a fraction of that power could do more harm than good in the wrong hands."

"Have I given you any reason to doubt my motives?" Adam questioned.

"No," Storm said with a smile. "If any have proven that their soul is in the right place, it is you, Adam."

With that, Adam used his quantum magic to forge a link between himself and Storm. As she channeled her immeasurable power into him, the golden hero instantly began to lift into the air. Before he could realize what he was doing, Adam raced through the atmosphere, leaving behind a weather trail infused with his healing abilities. At last, much-needed rain began to fall across the continent, reviving the parched land and restoring life.
100064.zh-Hans:
亚当术士望着眼前的满目疮痍，内心无比沉重。时间流纠缠不仅导致各个时间线分崩离析，更让本就脆弱不堪的生态系统严重失衡。这颗星球的气候如今正急剧恶化，欧亚大陆的大部分地区面临严重干旱。尽管亚当和他的英雄同伴们一直奋战在最前线，为现实的命运而战，但他们原本想要守护的普通民众仍生活在苦难之中。

"难道我们真的无能为力吗？"亚当问道，迫切地思索着解决之道。他绝不能接受在从死亡的手中拯救世人后，又眼睁睁看着他们被自然的残酷无常所折磨。

"我尝试过，"暴风女叹息着回答，"但这场危机太过严峻，绝非一个变种人能够独自应对的，即使她是一位女神。"

"那么请容我助你一臂之力，"亚当坚定地说，"若你允许，我可以联结我们的灵魂，或许也能融合我们的力量。"

"我承载着风暴所蕴含的所有怒火，"暴风女提醒道，"即便只是其中一小部分力量，若落入不当之手，也可能造成巨大的灾难。"

"我可曾做过什么让你怀疑我动机的事情？"亚当反问道。

"没有，"暴风女微笑着说，"反倒要说有谁的灵魂纯净无瑕，那就只能是你，亚当。"

亚当当即催动他的量子魔法，在自己与暴风女之间构建起一道联结。随着暴风女将浩瀚风暴导入亚当体内，一道金色的身影直入云霄。还未等他自己反应过来，亚当已在大气层内疾驰而过，身后留下一道蕴含其治愈之力的风暴轨迹。紧接着，久违的甘霖开始洒落整片大陆，复苏了干涸的土地，万物终于重焕生机。

100065.en:
Luck has always been on my side. But thanks to my betrayal of the Gilded Saint, some members of New York's Thieves Guild couldn’t be more against their new leader — me, the Black Cat. That ancient jerk convinced his most devoted followers that they could still achieve immortality if they stole back the enchanted artifacts I'd acquired. So it wasn't long before I found myself racing through the urban jungle faster than a jaguar with a bunch of second-rate crooks (and first-rate traitors) hot on my tail! But I knew exactly how to shake them...

Spidey let it slip that Captain America and White Fox were holding a secret meeting to discuss what was next for New York now that the Kingpin's reign had ended. So I figured I'd take a quick detour through their rendezvous point and let the heroes do the fighting for me while I escaped with the goods. Just to make sure my plan went off with a hitch, I infused a mystic orb with my fabulous fortune and tossed it to the duo of do-gooders. And the thieves took the bait! They chased after the orb instead of me... and ended up face-to-face with the defenders of two nations!

I watched from the shadows as a fight broke out, and let's just say Cap and the Fox did not hold back. It was clear that the good luck I transferred into the orb had rubbed off on them. White Fox struck down her enemies with even the most casual swings of her tails, while Captain America deflected projectiles straight back toward his opponents with uncanny accuracy. It didn’t take long before the thieves were running back to their master with their tails between their legs. I'd won... and I didn’t even have to break a claw!
100065.zh-Hans:
运气向来站在我黑猫这边。但不幸的是，自从我和黄金尊者“解约”之后，纽约盗贼公会里有些成员对我这位新领袖简直恨得牙痒痒。于是那个老不死的说服了他那些忠犬们：谁能把我顺走的那些宝物偷回去，他就保谁继续长生不老。所以一来二去，我身后就跟了一群二流罪犯（和一流叛徒），追着我像豹子一样在这钢铁丛林里穿梭！但可别以为我打算亲自招呼这群废物，我早就计划好了怎么甩掉他们……

不久前蜘蛛侠又说漏了嘴，告诉我美国队长和白狐这会儿要在附近会面，聊聊金并倒台后纽约的未来走向。我盘算着稍微绕两步路，赏光去一趟他们的接头地点。这样既能让英雄们过把胖揍坏蛋的瘾，我自己也能带着战利品溜之大吉，简直是双赢！当然我也不至于让他们给我打白工，我把自己绝佳的好运注入了一颗魔法宝珠里，把它扔给了那两位大好人。那些盗贼果然上钩了，他们果断放过我去追赶宝珠，结果一头撞上了两个国家的头号英雄！

我舒舒服服地躲在暗处，观赏这我导演的一出好戏。这么说吧，队长和白狐可丝毫没有手下留情。如我所料，我注入宝珠的好运传递到了他们身上。白狐只需要随意挥动尾巴，这些蠢货就会拿脸去迎接她的攻击；而美国队长则只需要举着盾牌，敌人的子弹就会以不可思议的准头弹回他们自己身上。没过多久，那些盗贼就夹着尾巴逃回他们主子那儿去了。我赢了……甚至没动一根爪子！

100067.en:
PUNISHER'S WAR JOURNAL:

Where I come from, the Alchemax megacorporation is always up to no good. But they've got the Public Eye on their payroll, which means the law tends to look the other way. Too bad for them, some heroes can't be bought so easy.

When Alchemax transported their HQ from the year 2099 back across time to the New York of an earlier era, our Resistance had no choice but to follow. We weren't about to let those capitalist scumbags get their hooks in another reality and bleed it dry. With the help of allies from multiple timelines, we prepared for war.

We got to the plaza in front of Alchemax HQ, but the Public Eye was waiting for us. They opened fire, pushing us back. Charging into action would have been suicide. Still, I could tell that one of us was willing to take the risk.

For Devil Dinosaur, a big red lizard wearing some sorta fancy temporal armor, this mission was personal. His best friend, Moon Girl, was trapped inside the tower. And we were her ticket to freedom. I could tell he wanted to plow forward and clear us a path... but even his animal brain saw the danger and caused him to hesitate.

I wasn't about to let him lose someone he loved. So I vaulted onto his scaly back and rode him into battle, guns blazing all the way. I'm sure watchning us tear the Public Eye's defense line to shreds was one hell of a show. Always thought I was the ultimate living weapon in the war against crime and corruption. Turns out, I've got serious competition for that title.

Doesn't matter if you’re from the far future or the prehistoric past... as long as you're fighting on the wrong side, you're gonna get a warm welcome of teeth and bullets.
100067.zh-Hans:
惩罚者战争日志：

在我的老家，炼金术这种巨型企业向来不干人事。但他们买通了整个公众之眼，这意味着法律通常会对他们的所作所为睁一只眼闭一只眼。可惜的是，有些英雄可没那么容易被收买。

当炼金术公司将他们的总部从 2099 年连根拔起，跨越时间一头栽进时代更早的纽约时，我们的抵抗组织别无选择，只能一路追击。我们绝不会让这群资本主义人渣将另一个现实敲骨吸髓。有了来自多条时间线的盟友，我们已经做好了全面开战的准备。

当我们抵达炼金术公司总部前的广场时，公众之眼已经在那里严阵以待。在发现我们的那一刻，他们立即开火，将我们死死压制在掩体后面，这时候贸然冲锋无异于自杀。不过我看得出来，我们中间有个家伙愿意冒这个险。

对于恶魔恐龙——这头穿着某种花哨时空装甲的红色大蜥蜴——来说，这趟任务夹杂着私人恩怨。他最好的朋友，月亮女孩，如今正被困在那座高塔里。而我们是她重获自由的唯一指望。我能看出来他想不顾一切地猛冲过去，为我们杀出一条血路……但即便是他的恐龙脑瓜也察觉到了前方的极度危险，让他踟蹰不前。

我不允许自己眼睁睁看着他失去自己所爱之人。所以我纵身骑上了他布满鳞片的后背，驾着他冲入战场，一路火力全开反向压制着公众之眼。我真羡慕其他人能够目睹我们把公众之眼的防线撕得粉碎，这场面一定相当壮观。我一直以为在这场对抗犯罪与腐败的战争中，我才是最极致的活体武器。现在看来，这个位置我可坐不稳了。

管你是来自遥远的未来，还是史前时代，都给我们小心点……只要你站错了队，迎接你的可就是尖牙与子弹的“热烈欢迎”。
